update: Administrators can set a data retention policy ( Preview ) on a project, on a new portal, or both. For more information, see  Configure data retention policy .

Translation Hub launched the following enhancements: 
 
 Administrators can add the same portal users and translators to multiple projects. 
 Administrators can add users as a portal user, translator, or both. 
 Administrators can  modify user roles . 
 For advanced-tier portals, administrators can set a default translation memory. For more information, see  Set a default translation memory . 
 Administrators can set translation memories to be read only. For more information, see  Set a read-only translation memory . 
 Administrators can invite translators by using the email and password sign-in method. 
 Administrators can filter users by name or role on the Translation Hub console's  Users  page.

Translation Hub is now enforcing the following behaviors: 
 
 For new projects, you must  enable  the Translation Hub API starting today. For existing projects, Google performed a one-time automatic enablement of the Translation Hub API to prevent service interruptions. 
 Translation Hub has expanded Identity and Access Management (IAM) permission enforcement. Previously, Translation Hub IAM permissions weren't required to add and remove users from Translation Hub. To modify user access to Translation Hub portals, you must have the  Translation Hub administrator  role. If you already have this role, no action is necessary.
To simplify portal creation, you can have Translation Hub automatically enable the portal's service account. For more information, see  Enable users to request translations .
The maximum number of admin-created and user-created translation templates has increased. For more information, see Usage limits in  Quotas and limits .

Glossaries are now supported for the recently added 24 languages. 
 
 Assamese 
 Aymara 
 Bambara 
 Bhojpuri 
 Dhivehi 
 Dogri 
 Ewe 
 Guarani 
 Ilocano 
 Konkani 
 Krio 
 Kurdish(Sorani)

 Luganda 
 Maithili 
 Meiteilon(Manipuri) 
 Mizo 
 Oromo 
 Quechua 
 Sanskrit 
 Sepedi(Pedi) 
 Tigrinya 
 Tsonga 
 Twi (Akan)

The translator workflow is in  Preview : 
 
 Administrators can invite translators to their project and add translators to post-editing groups. For more information, see  Enable post-editing requests . 
 Portal users can  request post-edits  from translators. 
 Translators can  review and edit translations .

Support for 24 new  languages  is  Generally Available  ( GA ). Glossaries aren't supported when translating to or from these languages.

Translation Hub  advanced-tier portals  is available in  Preview .
The basic tier for Translation Hub (a self-serve document translation service) is generally available ( GA ).
